case_title: KWAN, STEPHEN VS WONG, BONG L.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,129.40 FILED BY KWAN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BONG L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BONG L.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-15-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
TRIAL RESET TO APR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF MAR-15-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BONG L.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, BONG L. $1,129.40 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,149.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
